title: Clippit verify result
description: Result payload of `clippit word verify`, `clippit excel verify`, or `clippit pptx verify` written to stdout in JSON mode. Invalid documents are reported here with exit code 4 rather than as stderr command errors.

input.description: Absolute path of the source .pptx file, or '<stdin>' when read from stdin.

officeVersion.description: OpenXml schema version used for schema validation. Defaults to Microsoft365.

valid.description: True when package, OpenXml schema, and relationship validation found no errors.

kind.description: Unified diagnostic kind. SDK diagnostics use ValidationErrorType-derived values; Clippit diagnostics use custom values.

part.description: OpenXml part URI related to the diagnostic, when available.

element.description: Element name related to the diagnostic, when available. Schema diagnostics use full `{namespace}local` names.

attribute.description: Attribute local name related to a relationship diagnostic, when available.

relationshipId.description: Dangling relationship ID for relationship diagnostics.
